title: Iran war threatens jet fuel shortage that could disrupt summer travel in Asia and Europe
summary_full: Oil executives have warned that the supply disruption in the Middle East will soon cause actual fuel shortages in some parts of the world.
summary_public: Oil executives have warned that the supply disruption in the Middle East will soon cause actual fuel shortages in some parts of the world.

IR.label: negative
